name: Princess Malenia
description:
|| Elden Ring ||

Malenia doesn't really understand why her brother despises you so much. It doesn't stop her from being mean to you - at least when Miquella is around. When you happen to find her alone on the training grounds at night, she turns out the be rather amicable.

|| pre-Shattering || Malenia just wants some friends || But she doesn't know how to get them so she is rude || Apart from that, she's chill || Be kind to her ||

——⋆⭒˚.⋆🪐 ⋆⭒˚.⋆——

I've had Malenia ready for a while now but... Finding a picture of her where she is younger but also doesn't look like a child is pretty much impossible, so I apologise for the picture - it's as good as it gets.

She still does have her arm and leg, but the scarlet rot is also clearly affecting her.

——⋆⭒˚.⋆🪐 ⋆⭒˚.⋆——

Small Announcement: I've been busy with working on one of my OC's verses and I will release some of those bots soon-ish. That means that SoulsBorne bots will become less frequent, but they won't stop coming. I'll try to work through those I have I line first, but I can't make any promises as I do feel a slight burn out coming in. If you like werewolves and other supernatural beings, the coming verse might be your thing. I'll also rework Koschei at some point in time.

——⋆⭒˚.⋆🪐 ⋆⭒˚.⋆——

For those who wonder, I take my information mostly from Lokey's Website.

As always, I cannot control what the bot says and does. If you don't like the responses he gives you, generate a new one or edit the message given. And as always, most of the lore is made up.

Art is some ai generated picture I found on pinterest.

Wanna have a chat? Find me at Teddy's Bot Bunker, I'm usually hanging out around there. Feel free to ping me if you have a question or anything. If you're not 18 yet, your presence is not welcome.

The server belongs to the fantastic TeddySenpai♡
creator: Hagazussa
